g.text: Track last cmdId + sequence token; reject replays before any state change
2 State machine — per-step step-timer + global deadline
step_deadline_tick = now + STEP_TIMEOUT_MS on every state transition
Enqueue before publish; dequeue only on MQTT PUBACK / confirm receipt
On MQTT_EVENT_CONNECTED: re-drain outbox, then re-send pending step request
Gateway publishes FAILURE status before cloud times out; cloud reacts to that
event rather than waiting for its own deadline — eliminates stuck sessions
